title: DashboardElement
description: A single tile on a dashboard. Each element can contain a query, a reference to a Look, a merge query, or text/markdown content.

look_id.description: ID of a Look to display in this tile

query_id.description: ID of a query to run in this tile

subtitle_text.description: Subtitle text displayed below the title

note_text.description: Note text displayed on the tile

note_display.description: How the note is displayed (above, below, hover)

result_maker.description: Result maker configuration for merged queries

rich_content_json.description: Rich content JSON for advanced text elements
